description: DOM clobbering 2024 — id/name → property collision + HTMLCollection clobbering

id_name_property_clobber.description: Form/anchor element with id matching a JS global property hijacks document.X reference

probes.description: If document.test_global is read by client JS, the form clobbers it

htmlcollection_clobber.description: Two elements with same name → HTMLCollection — clobbers single-value property reads

probes.description: Two id=x → document.x is HTMLCollection, not a single element
